name: Curried Chicken and Bow Tie Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach chicken: Place in a large pot with enough cold water to barely cover. Add peppercorns, bay leaf, parsley, thyme, and onion, carrot, and celery cut into quarters. Bring to a boil with lid on; reduce heat to low and simmer for 50 minutes. Cool in poaching liquid, then drain, skin, and shred.
2. Make curry flavoring: Soften diced onion in hot oil, then add curry powder and cook over medium-high heat for a further 3 minutes. Add white wine and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce to about 3 tablespoons. Strain and let cool.
3. Prepare curry mayonnaise: Combine all ingredients until smooth.
4. Assemble salad: Mix peppers, chicken, pasta, salt, pepper, and curry mayonnaise in a large bowl until well-coated. If needed, add warm water gradually until smooth.
5. Serve: Place portion on bed of spinach and sprinkle reserved peppers on top. Assemble just before serving to maintain freshness.
